stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
During normal operation, which selections should be made on the rotary rotary switches shown in the annex?

options.a: NAV, with the system providing navigation and position data only
options.b: NAV, with the system providing navigation, position, and attitude data
options.c: ATT, with the system providing navigation, position, and attitude data
options.d: ATT, with the system providing attitude data only
